plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-510 RP16.P08.M06.S15-RP16.P09.M04.S04 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-510 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP16 p08 closeout p09 foundation: the P08 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the eight remaining rows), the full P08 Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P09 Scope Inventory, Contract Draft, Type And Shape Definition, and Primary Implementation Slice cycles, and the P09 Secondary Workflow Slice head (the first four rows) as ten descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H16), Claude review packet (C16), and CP00-511 handoff, without opening governance, DLP, legal hold, or retention runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-510 is a clean descriptor-only governance closeout pack (RP16.P08.M06.S15-RP16.P09.M04.S04, risk C, 150 units) with all boundaries intact. The pack-level claim is honest: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor; command-evidence production_ready=false with status implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout. The production_ready_flag (governance_core_p08_closeout_p09_foundation_descriptor_verified) is a descriptor-verification label, not a product/enterprise-trust claim. Counts reconcile to 150 across registry.js, validators.js, contract JSON, manifest, baseline, and command-evidence (deliverables 41/71/8/16/10/4; phases 84+66; micro-phase/micro-title distributions all asserted by the validator and tests). No-write/no-real-data boundaries verified: freezeCp510Result sets every runtime/write flag false and no_real_data=true; the all-false NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION chain is preserved into CP510; no fs/network/child_process usage in governance src; the validator only readFile()s contract/plan/manifest JSON. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob; claude_is_final_approval=false; promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true -> CP00-511). Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence packet/receipt handling (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false; receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write). CP178+ review hardening holds: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1432-byte valid-JSON stdout) and forbidden_review_evidence enumerates auth-failure, zero-byte, malformed-JSON, fenced-JSON, tool-call-shaped, disabled-tools, missing raw-output/inspection-basis, and final-approval/enterprise-trust rejections; validation-report confirms read-tools inspection with summary-only prohibited and no forbidden tools. Three dedicated CP510 tests plus comprehensive validator assertions are present, and all listed validation commands report exit 0. Changed-file scope is correctly limited to the governance package/contract/validator, with unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs, ldip invalid-attempt) properly excluded. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-510 governance core p08 closeout p09 foundation descriptor pack
